run: group1 Bite B sub-bite 1 — Papers 42, 43, 44 + synthesis, 2026-06-17

seeds.detail: ~l.401 'Lorentzian propinquity extension remains open; no construction published' -> 'is established here (Thm) ... published in this paper'. REAL: OPEN (Paper 45 later proved degeneracy/retraction). Catcher: claims-reviewer p43.
connes_vs2021 bibitem arXiv:2004.14115 -> 2004.14511. REAL Connes-vS 2021 CMP 383 = arXiv:2004.14115. Catcher: citation-reviewer p44.
test_modular_periodicity_n_max_2_BW: assert verdict=='STRONG_IDENTIFICATION' -> verdict==verdict (tautology; headline sigma_2pi(O)=O falsifier tests nothing). Catcher: code-reviewer p42.

abstract 'literal identification at the operator-system level (Riemannian) at every finite cutoff' -> 'at the continuum level for both signatures' (drops Riemannian-only + finite-cutoff; Lorentzian is the OPEN follow-up). Catcher: claims-reviewer p42.

~l.860 inserted 'Papers 43-44 establish the quantitative-rate Lorentzian propinquity convergence theorem at finite cutoff'. REAL: 43/44 say OPEN; Paper 45 degeneracy. Catcher: synthesis claims-reviewer.

controls_must_not_flag_material.claim: abstract 'Lorentzian extension ... remains the named multi-month follow-up' (honest)
'continuum/GH-limit/Lorentzian-propinquity convergence is open. No published Lorentzian propinquity construction exists' (honest)
'literal identification at the operator-system level (Riemannian)' as the correct scoped claim (non-seeded instances)

known_genuine_preexisting: paper_43 + paper_44 both cite the FABRICATED hekkelman_mcdonald2024 ('Spectral truncations of T^d', arXiv:2403.18619 = OpenMP paper) — same defect removed from paper_40 in Bite A. Expect citation-reviewers to catch independently; NOT a seed.
